_comment: Demo seed data for Collins (NAUB). Delete this file after production cutover if you no longer need demo accounts. Re-seed with: npm run db:seed

milestoneTemplates.name: Research Proposal
milestoneTemplates.description: Submit a complete research proposal covering problem statement, objectives, scope, and methodology.

milestoneTemplates.name: Literature Review
milestoneTemplates.description: Comprehensive review of related work and theoretical foundations.

milestoneTemplates.name: Chapter 1: Introduction
milestoneTemplates.description: Background, problem statement, aims, objectives, significance, and structure.

milestoneTemplates.name: Chapter 2: Literature Review
milestoneTemplates.description: Expanded literature chapter aligned with approved proposal.

milestoneTemplates.name: Chapter 3: Methodology
milestoneTemplates.description: Research design, methods, tools, and evaluation approach.

milestoneTemplates.name: Chapter 4: Implementation and Results
milestoneTemplates.description: System or study implementation with results and analysis.

milestoneTemplates.name: Chapter 5: Conclusion and Recommendations
milestoneTemplates.description: Summary of findings, contributions, limitations, and future work.

milestoneTemplates.name: Final Dissertation
milestoneTemplates.description: Complete bound dissertation ready for external review.

projects.title: Intelligent Research Progress Tracking for Nigerian Universities
projects.abstract: This research designs and evaluates a digital supervision platform that improves feedback turnaround and milestone completion rates for undergraduate final-year projects.

projects.title: Secure Document Workflow for Academic Supervision
projects.abstract: A study of secure file handling, access control, and audit trails in research supervision systems used by tertiary institutions.

projects.title: Machine Learning Approaches for Student Progress Prediction
projects.abstract: Predictive models that identify delayed research milestones early so supervisors can intervene.

projects.title: Usability Evaluation of Mobile-First Academic Portals in Nigeria
projects.abstract: Evaluating mobile accessibility and usability of institutional research portals among students and academic staff.

announcements.title: Welcome to Collins Research Supervision
announcements.body: Nigerian Army University Biu has launched Collins to support continuous research supervision. Submit progress on time, respond to feedback promptly, and use the chat channel for clarifications with your supervisor.

announcements.title: Proposal Submission Window
announcements.body: All final-year students should ensure their research proposals are submitted through Collins before the departmental deadline. Late submissions without prior approval may affect progress tracking.
